description: Massive context savings by lazy-loading MCP tools instead of preloading everything.
how: Upgrade to 2.1+ and keep default MCP search behavior enabled.

description: Simplify permission policy maintenance for autonomous workflows.
how: Use patterns like Bash(pnpm *) instead of listing each command.

action: Set up hooks for CI integration
description: Run linting, type checking, or tests automatically after code changes.
Unlocks full multi-file autonomous coding flows.
how: Enable Composer Agent in Cursor settings.

description: Per-context rules replace monolithic .cursorrules for better organization.
how: Create .cursor/rules/ directory with separate .md files per rule context.

description: Cleaner per-provider tuning and easier sharing across projects.
how: Split model-specific options into dedicated config blocks.

action: Use architect mode for complex changes
description: Two-model approach: architect plans, editor implements. Better results on big refactors.
how: Run with --architect flag or set in .aider.conf.yml.

description: Significantly faster startup, lower memory usage, and active development.
how: Install via cargo install codex-cli or download from GitHub releases.

action: Use Gemini 2.5 Flash for cost-sensitive tasks
description: Flash model is much cheaper with solid coding performance.
how: Set model to gemini-2.5-flash in config or via --model flag.

description: Reduces approval fatigue for safe operations like file reads.
how: Enable auto-approve for read-only tools in Cline settings.

action: Create custom modes for your team
description: Specialized agents for review, docs, testing with controlled permissions.
how: Define modes in .roomodes file with role definitions and permission groups.

description: Persist context across sessions for better continuity.
how: Add memory to extensions list in config.yaml.

description: Route different tasks to different models for cost/quality balance.
how: Configure model rules in config.yaml with task-specific routing.

action: Enable model aliases in gateway config
description: Avoid hardcoding provider/model IDs everywhere. Set up short aliases (fast, quality, code) in config so you can switch models site-wide with one line change.
how: Add `models.aliases` block to gateway config with fast/quality/code aliases pointing to your preferred models.

action: Run memory_search before answering prior-work questions
description: Without a mandatory recall step, agents answer from stale context. Semantic search over MEMORY.md gives accurate, grounded answers about past decisions.
how: Ensure MEMORY.md is populated and agents call `memory_search()` before responding to questions about previous work, decisions, or dates.

action: Set up HEARTBEAT.md for proactive monitoring
description: OpenClaw's heartbeat system lets agents self-monitor on a schedule without manual prompting. Great for budget guards, unread digests, or daily summaries.
how: Add a task line to HEARTBEAT.md. Agent will poll on schedule and alert if action is needed, ack with HEARTBEAT_OK otherwise.

action: Use sessions_spawn for long-running or parallel coding tasks
description: Don't block your main agent session with 10+ minute coding tasks. Spawn ACP harness sessions (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini) that run independently and report back.
how: Call `sessions_spawn({ runtime: 'acp', agentId: 'claude-code', thread: true, mode: 'session', task: '...' })` in Discord threads for persistent specialist agents.

description: Agents that know who they're helping produce dramatically better responses. Timezone, name, ongoing projects, and preferences belong in USER.md — not in every prompt.
how: Edit `~/.openclaw/agents/<agent>/USER.md` with your name, timezone, common projects, and communication preferences.

action: Install skills from ClawHub instead of building from scratch
description: Many common integrations already exist as polished, community-maintained skills. Check ClawHub before writing a custom integration.
how: Run `clawhub search <keyword>` to find skills. Install with `clawhub install <skill>`. Update all with `clawhub sync`.
